aeo_readiness.summary: The business has foundational elements for AEO readiness, such as schema markup and localized content, but lacks reviews and detailed content depth.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Expand service descriptions with targeted keywords to enhance content relevance.
Implement a blog section to create more content related to disaster restoration and cleaning tips.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) link, but it lacks reviews and detailed GBP optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not actively managed, as evidenced by the absence of reviews and incomplete profile optimization.
critical_issues: No customer reviews on GBP, which affects local search visibility and trust.
Incomplete business information or potential inconsistencies across platforms.
Lack of regular GBP posts or updates to engage with potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on the website but needs wider citation distribution across directories.
action_items: Audit and update NAP consistency across major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business listings.
Claim and optimize profiles on relevant local business directories.
Ensure NAP information is consistent and up-to-date on social media profiles.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
Missing Review schema to highlight customer testimonials.
No Service schema to provide detailed information about each service offered.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed content limits search engine visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed restoration services or customer experiences.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing schema markup for reviews and services to improve search appearance.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that establishes the business as an authority in disaster restoration, such as detailed guides and case studies.
